---
title: "#bioc2020-bioconductor-100_introduction-to-bioconductor-annotation-resources"
format: gfm
---

## 2020-07-21

**Levi Waldron** (08:29:07):
> @Levi Waldron has joined the channel

**Levi Waldron** (08:29:08):
> set the channel description: Discussion of Bioconductor 100: “Introduction to Bioconductor annotation resources”. See [https://jmacdon.github.io/Bioc2020Anno/](https://jmacdon.github.io/Bioc2020Anno/).


## 2020-07-24

**Levi Waldron** (04:22:49):
> archived the channel
